headlines.title: Pakistani Airstrikes Kill 75 Civilians Displace 115000 in Afghanistan
headlines.summary: Pakistani airstrikes targeted Afghan areas killing at least 75 civilians and displacing 115000 people as both sides vow further escalation without peace talks. Afghan civilians suffer heaviest losses; regional stability worsens with no negotiations planned. This intensifies cross-border conflict affecting South Asian security.

headlines.title: Rwanda-Backed Rebels Overrun Goma Troops Displacing Over 1 Million
headlines.summary: Rwanda-backed rebels entered Congo's Goma city with gunfire and shelling after defeating troops; over 1 million displaced residents now cram the aid hub. Congolese civilians and U.N. operations face immediate threats. This endangers humanitarian safe havens in eastern Congo.

headlines.title: Republicans Block Democrats Calls for Iran War Hearings in Congress
headlines.summary: Republicans resist public hearings on U.S.-Iran war entering third week despite Democrats demands for Trump officials testimony. U.S. lawmakers and public remain uninformed on conflict justification. This standoff delays oversight amid ongoing Middle East hostilities.

headlines.title: NASA SpaceX Launch Crew-10 Retrieves Astronauts Stuck Nine Months
headlines.summary: SpaceX Falcon 9 launched Crew-10 from Florida carrying four astronauts to International Space Station for routine rotation and return of Butch Wilmore Suni Williams after nine months. U.S. Japan Russia astronauts affected; docking expected Saturday. This resolves stranding ensuring station operations continuity.

headlines.title: Severe Storms Dump Snow High Winds Raise Tornado Threats Across US
headlines.summary: Severe weather hits eastern U.S. with snow in Midwest winds in Plains and tornado risks in mid-Atlantic; roads impassable in Upper Midwest. Millions of Americans face travel disruptions colder air incoming. This disrupts daily life economy during spring transition.

headlines.title: Rafah Crossing Closure Traps Gaza Patients Without Medical Evacuations
headlines.summary: Closure of Rafah crossing halts evacuations leaving thousands of Gaza patients worsening without treatment. Palestinian civilians in south Gaza suffer health crises. This exacerbates humanitarian blockade amid ongoing conflict.

headlines.title: Myanmar Junta Allies Convene Proxy Parliament First Time Since 2021 Coup
headlines.summary: Junta-stacked parliament meets in Naypyidaw five years after coup ousting elected government; covers one-third of country. Myanmar civilians under military rule face legitimacy questions. This entrenches junta control hindering democracy restoration.

headlines.title: UKs Starmer Urges Leaders Push Russia Toward Ukraine Ceasefire Talks
headlines.summary: British PM Keir Starmer tells coalition of mostly European leaders Russia must yield to ceasefire in three-year Ukraine war during virtual meeting. Ukrainian civilians soldiers affected; U.S. absent. This sustains diplomatic pressure for peace amid stalled talks.

headlines.title: Israel Allows Palestinians Stream Back Northern Gaza After Hostage Deadlock Breaks
headlines.previousContext: Deadlock over hostage releases broken enabling displaced Gazans to cross military zone
headlines.summary: Palestinians flock on foot to northern Gaza after Israel permits crossing bisecting enclave post-hostage breakthrough. Displaced Gazans return amid ruins; aid access uncertain. This eases some restrictions but highlights unresolved conflict dynamics.

headlines.title: NATO Launches Coordinated Response After Second Baltic Sea Cable Severed
headlines.previousContext: Another deep-sea cable severed in suspected sabotage campaign
headlines.summary: NATO mounts first coordinated response to infrastructure sabotage following new Baltic Sea cable cut. European energy telecom networks at risk; alliance bolsters defenses. This counters hybrid threats from adversaries.

headlines.title: Trump Pressures NATO China Send Warships Guard Strait Hormuz Oil Shipments
headlines.previousContext: Gains little traction as Iran closes strait to U.S. allies raising energy prices
headlines.summary: President Trump urges NATO allies China for warships amid Iran closure of Hormuz strait; U.S. energy secretary warns high prices persist. Global oil shipments allies affected. This tests alliances in escalating Iran conflict.
